title: Context7
description: Up-to-date code documentation lookup for LLM coding agents.

promotion.promotionReason: Context7 is the first documentation-lookup default candidate and registry/provenance canary because it is registry-backed, declares optional secret-backed behavior, and has a narrow documentation-query tool surface.

smokeTest.summary: Live ToolHive registry/provenance canary has installed Context7 when registry verification is available, discovered resolve-library-id/query-docs style tools, schema-validated bad arguments, called one tool, snapshotted descriptors globally, and removed the workload.

riskNotes: Remote documentation service traffic must remain visible to the user.
CONTEXT7_API_KEY is optional and must be entered through Ambient-managed secret flows, never chat or command arguments.
Descriptor drift remains guarded by the MCP tool snapshot review flow after install.

registryInfo.name: io.github.stacklok/context7
registryInfo.title: Context7
registryInfo.description: Up-to-date documentation lookup for LLM coding agents.

env_vars.name: CONTEXT7_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Optional Context7 API key for higher limits.
